problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
